## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I ran `pnpm build` and `pnpm --filter deltached typecheck`.
- [ ] I tested interruption/reversal when the change affects transitions.
- [ ] I added a changeset for a user-facing library change, or this PR does not need one.
- [ ] I updated documentation for public API or behavior changes.
- [ ] I did not include generated files, secrets, or unrelated changes.
